## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.16.2

### 🔔 Notifications
- Fixes the camera-event blueprint snapshot option so the snapshot is sent as notification image data instead of being pasted into the message text.
- Keeps the notification tap target on the X-Sense Recordings link when snapshots are enabled.

### 🧰 Blueprint Updates
- Adds a remote blueprint updater so future camera-event blueprint-only fixes can be pulled from the GitHub blueprint without requiring a full integration release.
- Keeps bundled blueprint repair in place and prevents remote blueprint downgrades below the installed integration version.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for snapshot notification payloads and remote blueprint version updates.
